methodology: Six independent signal categories (credit, capex, cloud, energy, IPO, demand-broadening) are read against fixed thresholds and classified Latent, Watch, or Breach. Convergence posture is a function of how many categories sit in Breach within a trailing 14-day window, weighed against demand-broadening as an anti-convergence offset. Liquid signals are re-read weekly; structural signals refresh on the hyperscaler earnings cycle.
disclaimer: Structural reference layer demonstrating conviction through dated, falsifiable reads. Records posture and signal state, not positions. Not investment advice, an investment product, a performance claim, or a solicitation. Human judgment governs; AI serves as instrumentation.

credit.note: Liquid spreads calm; high-yield OAS near cycle lows with no widening. Private-credit channel carries an amber early-warning baseline, not co-occurring with any liquid-market widening — no migration tell.

capex.note: Hyperscaler capex/revenue ratio expanding, not compressing — elevated and rising across the named buyers. Benign read: spend rising into demand that is still arriving.

cloud.note: All three hyperscaler cloud segments growing comfortably above breach thresholds. No deceleration concentration. Next refresh on the late-July earnings cycle.

energy.note: Wholesale-hub instrumentation being configured. No grid-stress narrative present in current reporting — a soft tell the power constraint is not breaking this week.

ipo.note: A marquee AI-adjacent listing posted a sub-20% day-one pop — technically a regime-change tell — but a strong aftermarket and broad demand cut against the cold-reception read. Treated as a soft breach.

demand_broadening.note: Broadening intact and strengthening — sovereign and custom-silicon demand widening rather than concentrating. The active anti-convergence offset; extends the window.

log.note: Inaugural read. Both breaches soft: capex is buildout-into-demand; the IPO breach is marginal and contradicted by a strong aftermarket. Demand-broadening intact. Posture: pre-position; staged de-risking not triggered.
